title: dioscorea × monandra
intro: Dioscorea × monandra, also known as the yam plant, is a sterile hybrid species of the Dioscorea genus, derived from the cross between Dioscorea alata and Dioscorea esculenta. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. Dioscorea × monandra has been found to provide several health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
